def negative_hidden_dependency_arrives_via_import_time_side_effect():
    rule_id = "hidden_dependency_arrives_via_import_time_side_effect"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that becomes initialized only because another import happened first."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
